_doc: Generated by tools/adversarial_review.py. Advisory review flags consumed by the page's conflicting-evidence panel. Regenerate; do not hand-edit.

flags.detail: sensitivity is computed as P(sign|localization) for 15 sign(s) from tagged ledger frequencies (marked 'corpus'); the rest, and ALL specificity, remain curator estimates (marked 'est.') because the corpus reports 1 specificity figure(s).
